category_sources: source_facts.description says it processes and distributes data; official Apache NiFi repository says NiFi is an easy to use, powerful, reliable system to process and distribute data.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is nifi-registry; official Apache Registry page uses Apache NiFi Registry.
docs_sources: Official Apache Registry page links Apache NiFi Registry Documentation; official docs index lists Getting Started, User Guide, Admin Guide, and REST API.
repo_sources: Official Apache NiFi site links Source to GitHub; official repository README says the source repository includes Apache NiFi Registry.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says centralized storage and management of NiFi/MiNiFi shared resources; official Registry page describes storing and managing versioned flows and shared resources.
